summary: Iteration 168: useCalendarAutoSync hook refactoring verification. All features working correctly - hook exists with proper document.hidden/visibilitychange references, duplicated code removed from Dashboard and Agenda, CalendarSyncPanel displays correctly on both pages, sync toggles and refresh button functional, NLYT me button works in Agenda views (non-regression).

passed_tests.dashboard_loads_no_errors: PASS - Dashboard loads without JS errors
passed_tests.dashboard_uses_hook: PASS - imports and uses useCalendarAutoSync with lastAutoCheckAt
passed_tests.dashboard_sync_toggles: PASS - Google and Outlook toggles work (data-testid='sync-toggle-google/outlook')
passed_tests.agenda_loads_no_errors: PASS - Agenda loads without JS errors
passed_tests.agenda_uses_hook: PASS - imports and uses useCalendarAutoSync with lastAutoCheckAt
passed_tests.agenda_sync_toggles: PASS - Google and Outlook toggles work on Agenda
passed_tests.agenda_refresh_btn: PASS - Refresh button works on Agenda
passed_tests.nlyt_me_button_day_detail: PASS - NLYT me button visible for external events in day detail panel
passed_tests.nlyt_me_button_day_view: PASS - NLYT me button visible in day view sidebar

critical_code_review_comments: useCalendarAutoSync.js: Correctly implements SYNC_INTERVAL_MS=120000, MIN_DELAY_BEFORE_RESYNC_MS=60000, guards with syncInProgressRef + syncingRef + document.hidden, visibilitychange listener - VERIFIED
OrganizerDashboard.js: Correctly imports useCalendarAutoSync, uses autoSyncCallback (useCallback), destructures lastAutoCheckAt, no duplicated refs - VERIFIED
AgendaPage.js: Correctly imports useCalendarAutoSync, uses autoSyncCallback (useCallback), destructures lastAutoCheckAt, no duplicated refs - VERIFIED
CalendarSyncPanel.js: Correctly displays auto-check indicator with data-testid='auto-check-indicator' when lastAutoCheckAt is set and hasAnyEnabled - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: useCalendarAutoSync hook refactoring verified. Key behaviors: (1) Hook centralizes auto-sync logic with 2-min interval, guards against double-sync, pause when tab inactive, immediate sync on return if >60s since last sync, (2) Dashboard and Agenda both use the hook correctly with autoSyncCallback and lastAutoCheckAt, (3) Duplicated code (syncIntervalRef, syncInProgressRef, syncingRef) successfully removed from both pages, (4) CalendarSyncPanel shows auto-check indicator when lastAutoCheckAt is set and at least one provider is enabled, (5) NLYT me button non-regression confirmed in Agenda views.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was a code refactoring task to extract duplicated calendar auto-sync logic into a reusable hook. The refactoring was successful.
